testcase.name: interaction record
testcase.system-err: Deprecation warning: value provided is not in a recognized RFC2822 or ISO format. moment construction falls back to js Date(), which is not reliable across all browsers and versions. Non RFC2822/ISO date formats are discouraged. Please refer to http://momentjs.com/guides/#/warnings/js-date/ for more info. Arguments: [0] _isAMomentObject: true, _isUTC: false, _useUTC: false, _l: undefined, _i: 2026/2/27 (金) 10:50, _f: undefined, _strict: undefined, _locale: [object Object] Error: at Function.createFromInputFallback (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:324:25) at configFromString (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:2613:19) at configFromInput (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:3056:13) at prepareConfig (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:3039:13) at createFromConfig (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:3006:44) at createLocalOrUTC (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:3100:16) at createLocal (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:3104:16) at moment (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/moment/moment.js:16:29) at file:///Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/tests/CIR/CIR.spec.ts:68:9 at file:///Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/tests/CIR/CIR.spec.ts:67:5 at /Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/workerMain.js:322:9 at /Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/testInfo.js:311:11 at TimeoutManager.withRunnable (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/timeoutManager.js:67:14) at TestInfoImpl._runWithTimeout (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/testInfo.js:309:7) at /Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/workerMain.js:320:7 at WorkerMain._runTest (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/workerMain.js:295:5) at WorkerMain.runTestGroup (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/worker/workerMain.js:199:11) at process.<anonymous> (/Users/ivanescoro/Desktop/epose-poc/node_modules/playwright/lib/common/process.js:65:22)
